case_title: PARKVIEW PRODUCE CO., INC. VS. LUISA'S ITALIAN RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $799.90 FILED BY PARKVIEW PRODUCE CO., INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LUISA'S ITALIAN RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PARKVIEW PRODUCE CO., INC.
